canto_title: The Ascent to Purgatory and the Encounter with the Guardian

scenes.summary: Dante introduces his new theme of Purgatory and invokes the Muses and Calliope to assist his song.
The celestial landscape changes as the dawn colors appear and the planet Venus rises in the sky.
Dante observes the bright northern stars and laments his inability to see them again.
Dante notices the elderly figure of Virgil illuminated by the celestial lights.
Virgil questions how Dante has escaped the underworld to reach these caves.
Virgil takes Dante by the hand and signals for him to follow.
Virgil explains that he was sent by a heavenly woman to guide souls.
Virgil requests permission to proceed through the terraces of Purgatory.
The interlocutor responds and instructs Dante to use a reed to cleanse his face.
A description of the fragile, reed-covered islet where nothing else can grow.
The figure vanishes, and Virgil directs Dante to follow him down the plain.
The pair walks through the lonely, dewy landscape as dawn approaches.
The sun hits the dew, and Dante is moved to tears by the sudden clarity of sight.
The travelers reach the deserted coast, where Dante finds a reed to wrap himself in.
